heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 459e–9 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated not more than $23,000,000 for the acquisition of lands and interests in land pursuant to sections 459e to 459e–9 of this title, and, after , not more than $500,000 for development.December 23, 1980
notes: Amendments1980— inserted provision authorizing $500,000 appropriation for development.Pub. L. 96–5851978— substituted “$23,000,000” for “$18,000,000”.Pub. L. 95–6251976— substituted “$18,000,000” for “$16,000,000”.Pub. L. 94–578
amendments: Amendments1980— inserted provision authorizing $500,000 appropriation for development.Pub. L. 96–5851978— substituted “$23,000,000” for “$18,000,000”.Pub. L. 95–6251976— substituted “$18,000,000” for “$16,000,000”.Pub. L. 94–578
